__NOINDEX__
{{CargoRelicResonance
|relics=Ishtar Gate,The Social Contract,A Sunday Afternoon on the Island of La Grande Jatte,TCP
|rank=orange
|amount=4
|category=Self
|description=Per 50 Kemet Soul Nail of Profanity Reforge, Snail Bedrock Power +9; Kemet Soul Nail of Profanity Reforged: 3,000/3,000
}}
[[Category:Self]]
[[Category:Bedrock Power Boost]]
